message:
refactor(cli,tui): extract dashboard runtime dispatch and add overall pressure field

Restructure the CLI dashboard entry point for cleaner routing between
legacy and new TUI paths, and adapt test fixtures for schema changes.

- Extract DashboardRuntimeSelection enum and DashboardRuntimeRequest
  struct with resolve_dashboard_runtime() and run_dashboard_runtime()
- Remove #[cfg(feature = "tui")] and #[serde(skip)] from dashboard
  CLI args; add #[cfg] stubs for non-tui builds
- Make tui feature depend on cli feature in Cargo.toml
- Add overall field to PressureState test fixture in update.rs
- Rustfmt cleanups in sqlite.rs, runtime.rs, telemetry.rs, update.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
